mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (`쉼표번호`, type, title, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, #{createdAt})
